name: Thai Chicken and Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Soup can be prepared a day ahead.
2. Storage: Covered, in Fridge.
3. Not suitable for freezing.
4. Microwave: Suitable.
5. Cut chicken into 2 cm slices.
6. Combine garlic, cumin and turmeric in pan, stir over heat until fragrant.
7. Add chicken, water, stock powder, sugar, paste, sambal oelek and galangal to pan, stirring until combined.
8. Bring to boil, then simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
9. Add vermicelli to pan and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Just before serving, stir in bean sprouts, lettuce and coriander.
